arrangement_notes: Starts with ethereal pads and delicate percussion, gradually building ambience. A subtle riser leads into the first drop, featuring a soulful, rolling amen break and lush melodic synths. A short, airy breakdown with evolving pads and a sparse drum rhythm creates space, before a more energetic build leads into the second drop, which introduces subtle vocal textures and a slightly more prominent bassline. The track fades out smoothly with echoing melodic elements and atmospheric textures.
